content: As of the latest available information, Alan Shaw is the CEO of Norfolk Southern Railway, having assumed the role in late 2022.
raw_content: As of the latest available information, Alan Shaw is the CEO of Norfolk Southern Railway, having assumed the role in late 2022.

Putting this all together, I think Alan Shaw is still the CEO of Norfolk Southern Railway.
